narrative:
East Guernsey Local Sd (Guernsey) school district has 4,422 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.2 percentage points.
